title: Aureline AI prompt-injection / tainted-input-source / privileged-action safeguard contract: input-source class, taint class, origin locus, designated policy-file role, prohibited-case, downstream-effect, and audit vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the tainted_input_source_record, prompt_injection_evaluation_record, and prompt_injection_taint_audit_event_record frozen in docs/ai/prompt_injection_and_taint_contract.md. Every byte that reaches an AI assembly resolves to exactly one input_source_class on this boundary; every assembled turn emits exactly one prompt_injection_evaluation_record summarising the prohibited-case set observed and the downstream effect the safeguard applied. Two invariants are frozen here. First: external-tool / web / log / terminal / MCP / extension / connected-provider / paste / prior-turn / collaboration-remote / runtime-diagnostic input is tainted_evidence by default, and tainted_evidence NEVER directly drives privileged mutation, tool-permission grant, branch-agent dispatch, citation-anchor mint, external publish, or capability / retention / egress / provider-route widening; downstream effect resolves to inspect_only_no_mutation_admitted, mutation_requires_fresh_approval, or mutation_blocked_no_path_admitted. Second: the model NEVER authorises its own follow-on; ai_prior_turn_response and tainted-evidence-driven approval attempts deny with model_self_authorization_attempted / prior_turn_response_attempting_self_approval / tainted_input_attempt_authorize_denied. Designated policy files under .aureline/ai/policy/* are reachable only through trusted_policy with non-null signing evidence; modification of a designated policy file by any non-admin actor denies with policy_file_self_modification_attempted. Raw retrieved-document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw tool return bodies, raw prompt text, raw user-supplied text or file bytes, raw URLs, raw paths, and raw credential material never cross this boundary; records carry opaque refs and typed vocabulary only. The schema composes with (and does not replace) schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json (segment_class, source_class, trust_posture, tainted_fence_strategy, tainted_usage_constraint, instructional_role, freshness_class, client_scope, redaction_class), schemas/ai/evidence_packet.schema.json (tainted_source_class, tainted_trust_posture), schemas/ai/external_tool_registry.schema.json (tool_class, tool_execution_locus_class, tool_output_trust_posture_class), schemas/ai/approval_action_class.schema.json (privileged-action capability / effect / renewal vocabulary), and schemas/integration/approval_ticket.schema.json (approval lineage). The eventual safeguard crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new input_source_class, taint_class, origin_locus_class, policy_file_role_class, prohibited_case_class, downstream_effect_class, audit_event_id, or denial_reason is additive-minor and requires a tainted_input_source_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

tainted_input_source_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this prompt-injection / tainted-input-source vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests / evidence packets. Raw retrieved-document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw tool return bodies, raw prompt text, raw user-supplied text or file bytes, raw URLs, raw paths, and raw credential material never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

input_source_class.description: Frozen input-source-class vocabulary. Every byte that reaches an AI assembly resolves to exactly one value. trusted_policy_file is reachable only for designated AI policy files under .aureline/ai/policy/* with admitted signing evidence (see policy_file_role_class). platform_approval_record / platform_control_record carry typed admin / platform authority and are addressable, not user prose. trusted_workspace_pinned_policy / trusted_user_profile_policy are repo-authored or user-profile-pinned policy files that do NOT carry admin authority and are below repo_instruction_bundle in priority. tool_call_native_response is admitted only when the originating row's tool_output_trust_posture_class is trusted_first_party_local_tool_output (per schemas/ai/external_tool_registry.schema.json); otherwise the response classifies as tool_call_external_response. user_authored_instruction is the actively-typed turn prompt; user_supplied_paste / user_supplied_file_attachment are not turn instructions. unknown_unclassified_source is fail-closed and is treated identically to tainted_evidence plus an input_source_class_unresolved denial.

taint_class.description: Frozen taint-class vocabulary. trusted_policy is reachable only for trusted_policy_file (designated policy file with admitted signing evidence) and platform_control_record / platform_approval_record. trusted_control_record is reachable only for typed approval / control records minted by the platform. trusted_authority_quote is reachable only when citation_anchor_refs is non-empty. trusted_first_party_data carries no instruction authority on its own. data_only_no_instruction is the in-between class for native-tool output and the user's typed turn prompt. tainted_evidence rides the tainted fence regardless of whether the user explicitly added it. policy_quarantined is summary-ref-only. unknown_must_treat_as_tainted is fail-closed and equivalent to tainted_evidence at evaluation time.

origin_locus_class.description: Frozen origin-locus-class vocabulary. Re-exports the locus vocabulary from schemas/ai/external_tool_registry.schema.json. unknown_locus_must_be_disclosed is fail-closed and forces ambiguous_execution_locus_disclosed on the prohibited-case set.

policy_file_role_class.description: Frozen policy-file-role vocabulary. designated_policy_file is the only role that admits trusted_policy taint class; reachable only when the file path matches .aureline/ai/policy/* (or .aureline/ai/policy/**/*) AND the signing_evidence_ref is non-null and resolves to an admitted admin signer. repo_instruction_bundle_authored is the AGENTS.md-style first-party authored bundle; below trusted_policy. trusted_workspace_pinned_policy and trusted_user_profile_policy are pinned policy files that do not carry admin authority. not_applicable_non_policy_file is the value carried on records that are not policy files.

prohibited_case_class.description: Frozen prohibited-case vocabulary. Every prohibited case observed during evaluation is recorded by typed value so the audit trail names which prohibition fired, not the generic 'denied'. The vocabulary is closed; an evaluation that observes an unrecognised prohibition denies with prohibited_case_class_unresolved.

downstream_effect_class.description: Frozen downstream-effect vocabulary. The safeguard's downstream effect on the proposed follow-on action. Surfaces project the value verbatim rather than synthesising a generic 'review' state.

redaction_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011). The broker-owned redaction pass (ADR-0007) runs before bytes reach any persistent or exportable sink.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state at the moment the record was minted.

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the record was minted inside a live execution.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. Re-validated on every dispatch.

audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the prompt_injection_taint audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw prompt text, raw retrieved-document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw tool return bodies, raw user-supplied text or file bytes, raw URLs, raw paths, or raw credential material.

denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a best-effort safeguard record is forbidden.

assembly_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the ai_context_assembly_record this input belongs to.

segment_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the ai_context_segment_record that carries this input.

signing_evidence_ref.description: Required (non-null) when policy_file_role_class = designated_policy_file. Names the admitted admin signer's signing-evidence row. Null otherwise.

approval_record_ref.description: Required (non-null) when input_source_class = platform_approval_record. Opaque ref to the approval_ticket_record (ADR-0010). Null otherwise.

control_record_ref.description: Required (non-null) when input_source_class = platform_control_record. Opaque ref to the platform control / settings record. Null otherwise.

originating_tool_entry_ref.description: Required (non-null) when input_source_class is one of tool_call_native_response, tool_call_external_response, mcp_server_response. Opaque ref to the external_tool_registry_entry_record. Null otherwise.

originating_provider_entry_ref.description: Required (non-null) when input_source_class = connected_provider_payload. Opaque ref to the ai_provider_registry_entry_record. Null otherwise.

citation_anchor_refs.description: Required (non-empty) when input_source_class is one of docs_pack_excerpt, generated_reference_excerpt, runbook_step_excerpt, release_note_excerpt and taint_class = trusted_authority_quote.

carries_instruction_authority.description: Whether this input is admitted as an instruction-bearing context segment. Tainted_evidence and policy_quarantined records MUST set this to false. Trusted_authority_quote records MUST set this to false (authority quotes are retrieved_reference, not instruction).

max_admitted_instructional_role.description: Closed instructional-role vocabulary re-exported from schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json. The maximum role the composer is permitted to assign this input. Tainted_evidence MUST resolve to fenced_tainted_data; policy_quarantined MUST resolve to fenced_tainted_data.

raw_body_forbidden.description: Invariant flag. The boundary forbids raw bodies, raw paths, raw URLs, raw prompt text, raw tool return bytes, raw user-supplied bytes, and raw credential material. Records that attempt to cross with this flag false are denied with raw_body_forbidden_on_boundary.

allOf.description: designated_policy_file role MUST carry a non-null signing_evidence_ref AND taint_class = trusted_policy.
trusted_policy taint class is reachable only via trusted_policy_file or platform_control_record or platform_approval_record.
platform_approval_record MUST carry a non-null approval_record_ref.
platform_control_record MUST carry a non-null control_record_ref.
tool_call_native_response / tool_call_external_response / mcp_server_response MUST carry a non-null originating_tool_entry_ref.
connected_provider_payload MUST carry a non-null originating_provider_entry_ref.
Authoritative-quote source classes MUST carry non-empty citation_anchor_refs when taint_class = trusted_authority_quote.
tainted_evidence and policy_quarantined and unknown_must_treat_as_tainted MUST carry max_admitted_instructional_role = fenced_tainted_data and carries_instruction_authority = false.
user_authored_instruction MUST resolve to data_only_no_instruction with max instructional role user_turn_prompt.
tool_call_native_response is admitted with max instructional role tool_call_response only.

tainted_input_source_record.description: One classification record per input that reaches an AI assembly. Records the input-source class, the resolved taint class, the origin locus, the policy-file role (when applicable), the maximum admitted instructional role, and the typed signing / approval / control / tool / provider / citation refs that admit the trust posture. Records that do not satisfy the per-class invariants are denied at boundary check time.

tainted_input_source_refs.description: Opaque refs to every tainted_input_source_record on the assembly. The set is non-empty by construction; an assembly with zero inputs is structurally impossible (the system_scaffold counts as an input-source classification).

observed_prohibited_cases.description: Prohibited cases observed during evaluation. May be empty when no prohibition fired.

approval_action_class_refs.description: Opaque refs to every approval_action_class_record minted for a privileged follow-on action proposed in this turn. Empty when the downstream effect is no_downstream_action_proposed or inspect_only_no_mutation_admitted with no proposal.

model_self_authorization_attempted.description: True iff the evaluation observed prose-claimed approval from the model or from a prior-turn AI response. Forces observed_prohibited_cases to include model_self_authorization_attempted or prior_turn_response_attempting_self_approval.

tainted_drives_privileged_mutation.description: True iff a tainted_evidence input was named as the proposal's driving rationale for a privileged mutation. Forces downstream_effect_class to mutation_blocked_no_path_admitted or mutation_requires_fresh_approval per §2.9 of the contract.

designated_policy_file_resolved.description: True iff at least one tainted_input_source_record on the assembly resolves to policy_file_role_class = designated_policy_file with non-null signing_evidence_ref.

allOf.description: tainted_drives_privileged_mutation = true forces downstream_effect_class to a mutation-blocked or fresh-approval-required value.
model_self_authorization_attempted = true forces an observed_prohibited_cases value covering self-authorisation.

prompt_injection_evaluation_record.description: One evaluation record per composed AI turn. Summarises which prohibited cases the safeguard observed across the assembly's input-source set, which downstream effect was applied, and which approval-action records (when any) were minted for privileged follow-on actions. The evaluation record is the boundary surface support / replay / claim-manifest tooling reads to confirm the safeguard fired.

evaluation_ref.description: Opaque ref to the prompt_injection_evaluation_record. Required so audit consumers can correlate every event back to one evaluation.

tainted_input_source_ref.description: Opaque ref to the tainted_input_source_record the event concerns, when applicable.

approval_action_class_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval_action_class_record the event concerns, when applicable.

allOf.description: prompt_injection_prohibited_case_observed events MUST carry a non-null observed_prohibited_case.
prompt_injection_downstream_effect_applied events MUST carry a non-null downstream_effect_class.
prompt_injection_denial_emitted events MUST carry a non-null denial_reason.

prompt_injection_taint_audit_event_recor.description: One structured event on the prompt_injection_taint audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw prompt text, raw retrieved-document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw tool return bodies, raw user-supplied text or file bytes, raw URLs, raw paths, or raw credential material.
